name: DOUBLEBACK OREGON LLC
address: 555 NW ARIZONA AVE STE 198, BEND, OR 97703

fr.elements: Main Building; Vehicle Parking Area; Pedestrian Walkways; Landscaped Area
fr.considerations: Multiple Access Points; Large Parking Area
fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response effectiveness at this property could benefit from ensuring clear and unobstructed access routes throughout the premises. Maintaining defined and well-marked entry points, especially leveraging the multiple access points, may aid rapid entrance and egress for emergency responders. The large vehicle parking area could serve as an effective space for staging equipment and personnel if kept clear and designated appropriately for such use in emergency scenarios. Additionally, ensuring pedestrian walkways remain unobstructed could facilitate smooth navigation and quick movement of responders across the site. Regular maintenance of the landscaped areas may also assist in preserving clear sightlines and movement corridors, which can contribute to visibility and operational effectiveness during response activities.

wildfire.recommendations: Managing vegetation directly adjacent to the structure can enhance defensible space and reduce potential wildfire exposure. Consider increasing the separation between the structure and nearby combustible vegetation to minimize direct flame contact. Reducing the density and continuity of vegetation around the immediate perimeter of the property may also help prevent fire from easily spreading to the structure. Regular trimming and maintenance of shrubs and low-lying vegetation, ensuring that they are kept well away from walls and eaves, could be beneficial. These actions may support a safer environment for firefighter access and suppression activities while contributing to long-term wildfire resilience.
